selections.name: Beev's Blessing
selections.reason: Projects as the lone 'E' speed in this sprint. Receives a massive +5 pace bonus and +3 early speed bonus. Should control the fractions.

selections.name: Vino's Valentine
selections.reason: Owns the highest base speed figure (100) in the field. Class drop and outside draw make him a major threat if the pace collapses.

selections.name: Magic Beach
selections.reason: Consistent presser with solid mid-90s speed figures. Will get a favorable trip stalking the lone speed.

selections.name: Juniors Pal
selections.reason: Inside draw is advantageous at Finger Lakes. Can save ground and pick up pieces late.

danger_horse.name: God's Angel
danger_horse.reason: Capable of running a solid pressing trip, but needs to improve slightly to beat the top choices.

selections.name: Banking Silver
selections.reason: Strong base speed figure of 100 and gets a +2 bonus as an inside presser. Class rating of 103 stands out in this maiden field.

selections.name: Three Nines Fine
selections.reason: Drawn perfectly on the rail for a speed-favoring track. Has the early foot to utilize the post bias.

selections.name: Snowbody Blink
selections.reason: Solid late runner who can capitalize if the early pace gets too hot between the inside runners.

selections.name: Celeslia
selections.reason: Class rating of 96 suggests she has faced better. Can hit the board with a clean trip from the inside.

danger_horse.name: Lady Isabella
danger_horse.reason: Showed early speed in previous starts and could complicate the pace scenario.

selections.name: Klum
selections.reason: Top base speed figure of 102. Even with a slight penalty for a closer in a sprint, her raw numbers tower over most of the field.

selections.name: Eze Village
selections.reason: Tied for the highest base speed figure (102). Dangerous late threat if the pace is honest.

selections.name: Playingon Broadway
selections.reason: Projects as the lone early speed. Upgraded significantly (+8 points) due to the pace void and rail draw.

selections.name: Rock Steady Babe
selections.reason: Highest class rating in the field (104). Dropping into a spot where her back class could shine.

danger_horse.name: Fairweatherlover
danger_horse.reason: Consistent presser who could inherit a good trip if the closers fail to fire.

selections.name: Isola D'oro
selections.reason: Pace void scenario benefits this inside presser (+4 points). Strong base speed of 95 and class of 95.

selections.name: Shakeitforthebird
selections.reason: Another inside presser who gets a pace upgrade. Class rating of 98 is the highest in the field.

selections.name: Mo Mahomie
selections.reason: Solid base speed of 94. Will be stalking from the outside and has the numbers to compete.

selections.name: Joe G Twentythree
selections.reason: Gets an inside presser upgrade. Needs to improve slightly but can hit the bottom of the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Wisecracker
danger_horse.reason: Class rating of 90 indicates back class, could wake up in this spot.

selections.name: Swedish Candy
selections.reason: Pace meltdown scenario with 3+ early speed horses. Gets a +5 closer bonus on top of a strong 97 base speed.

selections.name: Sharp Play Boy
selections.reason: Another beneficiary of the projected hot pace. Will be picking up the pieces late.

selections.name: Tap It Easy
selections.reason: Inside draw and a stalking style sets him up perfectly behind the dueling leaders.

selections.name: Cool Hand Rich
selections.reason: Strong base speed of 97, but penalized (-4) for being part of a contested early pace.

danger_horse.name: Painting Stones
danger_horse.reason: High class rating (97) but faces a tough pace scenario. Dangerous if he clears easily.

selections.name: My Gorgeous
selections.reason: Dominant base speed figure of 98. Should be able to stalk and pounce from the outside draw.

selections.name: Light The Mira
selections.reason: Inside presser in a race lacking early speed. Gets a +4 pace bonus and has a strong 98 class rating.

selections.name: Signal Chat
selections.reason: Another inside stalker who benefits from the pace void. Consistent figures make her a logical contender.

selections.name: Wayward Queen
selections.reason: Rail draw and presser style give her a chance to hit the board at a price.

danger_horse.name: Find Me A Prince
danger_horse.reason: Can sit a good trip just off the pace, though figures are slightly lower than the top tier.

selections.name: Bunny Honey
selections.reason: Massive speed figure advantage (109). Even as a closer on a speed track, her raw numbers are too good to ignore.

selections.name: Spun Size
selections.reason: Strong base speed of 101 and gets a +2 bonus for an honest pace scenario. Class rating of 100 is solid.

selections.name: Lipan Law
selections.reason: Inside draw and a pressing trip (+2 bonus) give her a great chance to hit the exotics.

selections.name: April Storm
selections.reason: One of the early speed types. High class rating (99) makes her dangerous if left alone.

danger_horse.name: Honest Reason
danger_horse.reason: Highest class rating in the field (104). Could outclass them if the pace isn't too taxing.

selections.name: Freedsdale
selections.reason: Projects as the lone early speed in a route race. Gets a massive +5 pace upgrade and should dictate terms.

selections.name: He's Got This
selections.reason: Top base speed figure of 102 and highest class rating (97). Will be stalking the lone speed.

selections.name: Cascade Cruiser
selections.reason: Strong base speed of 98 and class of 90. Outside draw shouldn't be an issue with his pressing style.

selections.name: Tapizar's Temper
selections.reason: Consistent mid-90s figures. Can grind out a minor placing.

danger_horse.name: Big Rich
danger_horse.reason: Rail draw in a route race is always dangerous. Can save ground and sneak into the superfecta.
